creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #1)

In what I reported:

clang++  -B/usr/local/powerpc64-freebsd/bin/  -std=c++11 -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti  -stdlib=libc++ -Wno-c++11-extensions  -c /usr/src/contrib/llvm/lib/Support/APInt.cpp -o Support/APInt.o

the

-B/usr/local/powerpc64-freebsd/bin/

is from my use of:

CXXFLAGS+= -B${CROSS_BINUTILS_PREFIX}

but there was also:

CFLAGS+= -B${CROSS_BINUTILS_PREFIX}

yet the -B text was not duplicated. Also there are the
:

-std=c++11
-fno-exceptions
-fno-rtti
-stdlib=libc++
-Wno-c++11-extensions

All but the last came from llvm.build.mk :

# more /usr/src/lib/clang/llvm.build.mk
. . .
CFLAGS+=        -DLLVM_DEFAULT_TARGET_TRIPLE=\"${TARGET_TRIPLE}\"
CFLAGS+=        -DLLVM_HOST_TRIPLE=\"${BUILD_TRIPLE}\"
CFLAGS+=        -DDEFAULT_SYSROOT=\"${TOOLS_PREFIX}\"

CXXFLAGS+=      -std=c++11
CXXFLAGS+=      -fno-exceptions
CXXFLAGS+=      -fno-rtti
CXXFLAGS.clang+= -stdlib=libc++
. . .

but only the CXXFLAGS ones of the above showed up in the
command that I quoted. The CFLAGS ones did not.

The -Wno-c++11-extensions is from:

/usr/src/share/mk/bsd.sys.mk:CXXFLAGS.clang+=	 -Wno-c++11-extensions
